sop_instruction: Confirm chassis alignment markers match the SOP reference before proceeding.
reason: Alignment markers matched SOP tolerance and operator completed the check in sequence.

sop_instruction: Route the battery harness through the left retaining clip before connector lock.
reason: Battery harness routing skipped the left-side retaining clip required by the SOP.

sop_instruction: Apply the five-point torque sequence and confirm final torque is within threshold.
reason: Measured torque pattern was incomplete and final torque values were below the required SOP threshold.

sop_instruction: Attach the protective cap after confirming a clear top-down camera view.
reason: The camera view was obstructed during the attachment window, so the agent could not confirm the step outcome.

sop_instruction: Validate all dashboard indicators illuminate and clear during final startup.
reason: All dashboard indicators illuminated and cleared according to the final validation step.
